Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 09/11/2024
This week, recycling markets across regions like South Asia and Turkiye remained largely subdued, showing mixed trends
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
05 November - 08 November 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, recycling markets across regions like South Asia and Turkiye remained largely subdued, showing mixed trends. In India, a modest post-festival
demand boost lent minor stability, though its persistence is uncertain. Bangladesh saw limited demand and minimal transactions, with prices holding
steady but soft as many steel mills face challenges that restrict operations.
